title: NQBlade Performance
author: Some_Fly_4552
selftext:
NQBlade is a rule-based NAS100 trading bot built around a trend-following approach. It uses trend alignment, higher-timeframe confirmation, volatility filters, and structured risk management to look for cleaner setups instead of random entries.

Trades are managed with a stop loss, partial take profits, and a trailing stop, with the goal of combining controlled risk with the ability to catch larger moves.

This post is just to share some performance and give a look into how the bot behaves.

If you’re interested and want more details, feel free to message me.
